ItacPersonItem.Notes: Member of the Academies degli Umorosi e degli Umidi in Cortona, with the nickname il Tranquillo. Professor of Humanitates in the Sienese studium, developed research interests in linguistics and literature. See his biography by Mario De Gregorio, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
